status_legend.active: The one feature currently being worked.
status_legend.blocked: Progress is stopped by a documented blocker.
status_legend.passing: Verification passed and evidence is recorded.

features.title: RunHaven project rename
features.user_visible_behavior: The repo, installable package, CLI command, image tags, runtime resource names, docs, and harness metadata consistently use the RunHaven name.
verification: Old project, module, and CLI names are absent from tracked text
Python package imports use `runhaven`
Console command is `runhaven`
Tests and package build pass
Harness audit passes
evidence: 2026-06-14: no-ignore old-name text scan across working tree files outside `.git` returned no matches
2026-06-14: old-name filename scan across working tree files outside `.git` returned no matches
2026-06-14: `PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m unittest discover -s tests` passed
2026-06-14: `python3 scripts/check_pins.py` passed
2026-06-14: temporary external venv installed pinned dev requirements; ruff, mypy, build, wheel install, and `runhaven agents` passed
2026-06-14: `PYTHONPATH=../HarnessForge/src python3 -m harnessforge audit --target . --min-score 85` reported 100/100 after the macOS-only correction
features.notes: GitHub repository remote rename is a separate credentialed vendor change and requires explicit approval before execution.

features.title: Repository harness operating layer
features.user_visible_behavior: A new agent can start from repo files, choose one scoped objective, run verification, and leave a clean handoff without relying on chat history.
verification: Root instructions route to state, startup, verification, and done criteria
macOS verification entrypoint runs the full local check set
Harness docs include manifest, component inventory, verification matrix, evidence log, security map, and lifecycle files
Harness audit passes the configured threshold
evidence: 2026-06-14: `PYTHON=<temporary-venv-python> ./init.sh` passed
2026-06-14: non-macOS verification entrypoint was removed when the project was clarified as macOS-only
2026-06-14: `PYTHONPATH=../HarnessForge/src python3 -m harnessforge audit --target . --min-score 85` reported 100/100 after the macOS-only correction
features.notes: This feature addresses the audit bottleneck reported before harness adoption.

features.title: Runtime hardening and macOS-only boundary
features.user_visible_behavior: RunHaven rejects unsafe command inputs by default, exposes explicit unsafe overrides, manages RunHaven state volumes, and only supports macOS 26+ verification.
verification: Unsafe image references, resource values, network modes, workspaces, root users, and root groups are rejected by tests
TTY and interactive behavior are controllable from the CLI
RunHaven state listing and prune behavior are tested
macOS-only entrypoints and CI are enforced
Full local verification and harness audit pass
evidence: 2026-06-14: `PYTHONPATH=src python3.14 -m unittest discover -s tests` ran 34 tests and passed
2026-06-14: `PYTHONPATH=src python3.13 -m unittest discover -s tests` ran 34 tests and passed
2026-06-14: `python -m ruff check .` passed in a temporary hardening venv
2026-06-14: `python -m mypy src scripts` passed in a temporary hardening venv

2026-06-14: `PYTHONPATH=src python3.14 -m runhaven state list` passed

2026-06-14: `PYTHONPATH=src python3.14 -c 'from runhaven.cli import ensure_internal_network; ensure_internal_network("runhaven-smoke-20260614-hardening-internal")'` passed and the temporary network was deleted
2026-06-14: `PYTHONPATH=src python3.14 -m unittest discover -s tests` ran 39 tests and passed after the follow-up hardening pass
2026-06-14: `python3.14 scripts/check_pins.py` passed after dynamic image template discovery was added
2026-06-14: harness audit reported 100/100 after the macOS-only correction
2026-06-14: `PYTHON=<temporary-venv-python> ./init.sh` passed after the second follow-up hardening pass; the unit suite ran 47 tests

2026-06-14: `PYTHONPATH=src python3.14 -m runhaven run --help`, `PYTHONPATH=src python3.14 -m runhaven plan shell --network internal --tty never -- /bin/true`, and `PYTHONPATH=src python3.14 -m runhaven doctor` passed after the second follow-up hardening pass

features.title: Provider egress allowlisting
features.user_visible_behavior: Internet-enabled agent runs can be restricted to reviewed provider and package endpoints instead of unrestricted egress.
verification: Threat model updated
Reserved provider network mode fails closed until enforcement exists
Provider allowlist behavior tested
Runtime smoke proves denied and allowed network paths
Docs state exact limitations
evidence: 2026-06-14: Rendered Apple DocC networking docs with Playwright and checked generated DocC JSON endpoints for `ContainerNetworkService`.
2026-06-14: Reviewed the complete user-supplied DocC snapshot: 1,022 rendered Markdown pages plus raw DocC JSON, zero fetch failures, and no exact hits for egress or allowlist control terms.
2026-06-14: Local Apple `container` 1.0.0 CLI help and command reference expose DNS selection, NAT networking, and host-only networks, but no domain egress allowlist flag.
2026-06-14: Added reserved `--network provider` mode that fails closed until provider egress enforcement exists.
2026-06-14: `PYTHON=<temporary-venv-python> ./init.sh` passed with 49 tests, pin check, ruff, mypy, and build.
2026-06-14: `PYTHONPATH=src python3.13 -m unittest discover -s tests` ran 49 tests and passed.
2026-06-14: `PYTHONPATH=../HarnessForge/src python3.14 -m harnessforge audit --target . --min-score 85` reported 100/100.
2026-06-14: `PYTHONPATH=src python3.14 -m runhaven plan shell --network provider` exited 2 with a fail-closed provider egress message.

2026-06-14: `python3 -m json.tool feature_list.json`, `python3 scripts/check_pins.py`, `git diff --check`, local absolute-path leak scan, and `PYTHONPATH=<temporary-HarnessForge-copy>/src python3.14 -m harnessforge audit --target . --min-score 85` passed after the complete DocC snapshot evidence update.
features.notes: Current internet mode remains unrestricted egress and is documented as a known limitation. The current active slice is fail-closed preparation, not completed provider allowlisting.

features.title: Project logo integration

Harness manifest requires the logo asset
